name: The Fungal Pantry of Gribbles Rindsworth
flavor_text: The air grows thick with the pungent aroma of cave mushrooms and... is that cheese? The rough-hewn tunnels ahead are goblin-made, their walls scratched with crude drawings of what appears to be a very small figure wearing an oversized crown and holding a wedge of cheese aloft like a holy relic. Welcome to the domain of Gribbles Rindsworth the Magnificent.

connections.description: A crude wooden door with 'KEEPE OUT — GRIBBLES PANTRY' scratched into it
Rough-cut stairs descending into darkness. Spider silk glistens on the walls.
A surprisingly well-crafted iron-banded door with a sign reading 'HIS MOST MAGNIFICENTEST MAJESTY'S THRONE ROOM — KNOCK FIRST'
A section of wall that swings open when a loose stone shaped like a cheese wedge is pressed.

environmental_effects.description: Fungal spores fill the air. DC 15 Fortitude save each minute or sickened 1.
Thick spider webs make all webbing hexes difficult terrain. Creatures ending their turn in webbing must succeed at DC 18 Reflex or be immobilized.

rooms.name: The Welcoming Gutter
rooms.description: A rough cavern entrance with surprisingly elaborate (if poorly executed) welcome decorations. Strings of dried mushrooms hang from the ceiling like garlands. A crudely painted sign reads 'WELCOM TO GRIBBLESTOWN — POPULLATION: MAGNIFICINT'. The air smells of damp earth and something vaguely cheesy.

interactables.name: Mushroom Garlands
interactables.description: Dried cave mushrooms strung on spider silk. They're decorative, not edible. Probably.
interactables.result: The mushrooms are various species — some bioluminescent, some clearly poisonous, and one that smells distinctly like aged cheddar.

rooms.name: Gribbles' Fungal Pantry
rooms.description: A damp cavern that Gribbles has converted into his personal food storage. Mushrooms of every conceivable variety grow from the walls, floor, and ceiling in riotous profusion. Several crude shelving units hold clay pots sealed with wax — Gribbles' prized cheese collection. The air is thick with spores and the unmistakable funk of fermenting dairy products. A small cooking fire (dangerously close to the fungi) has a pot of something bubbling away.
rooms.light_source: none (cooking fire provides dim light in 2 hexes)

traps.name: Gribbles' Cheese Alarm
traps.description: A tripwire connected to a tin can full of pebbles. If anyone touches the cheese shelf, it creates a tremendous racket alerting Gribbles.

rooms.name: The Spider Nests
rooms.description: The passage descends into a web-choked cavern. Thick strands of spider silk cover every surface, and dark shapes skitter in the shadows. The webs are so dense in places they form hammock-like structures where egg sacs hang ominously. Gribbles claims he has a 'business arrangement' with the spiders. The spiders have not confirmed this.

items.name: Cocooned Adventurer's Pack
items.description: A previous adventurer wrapped in spider silk. Their pack contains some salvageable gear.

rooms.name: The Magnificentest Throne Room of His Most Resplendent Majesty Gribbles Rindsworth
rooms.description: Against all expectations, this room is genuinely impressive — by goblin standards. The walls have been laboriously carved with (mostly inaccurate) scenes of Gribbles' alleged heroic deeds. Torches burn in iron sconces, filling the room with warm light and moderate smoke. At the far end, atop a raised platform made of stacked crates, sits 'The Cheese Throne' — an actual wooden chair that Gribbles has decorated with cheese rinds, brass buttons, and what appears to be a cat's collar repurposed as a crown rest. Behind the throne, a tattered tapestry depicts a goblin figure the size of a dragon, triumphantly holding cheese aloft while tiny humanoids cower below.

items.name: The Cheese Throne
items.description: It's a chair with cheese rinds glued to it. It is priceless to Gribbles and worthless to everyone else.

items.name: Gribbles' Treasure Chest
items.description: A battered wooden chest containing Gribbles' life savings and most prized possessions.

traps.name: Fake Floor Pit Trap
traps.description: A concealed pit trap right inside the door. Gribbles installed it after the 'Great Cheese Heist of Last Tuesday'. He occasionally forgets about it himself.

interactables.name: The Cheese Throne
interactables.description: You could... sit in Gribbles' throne. This would either deeply offend him or deeply impress him. Possibly both.
interactables.result_success: Gribbles is so startled by your audacity that he respects you. He offers you 'The Big Cheese' — a genuine wheel of cave-aged cheddar worth 5gp and his grudging admiration.
interactables.result_failure: Gribbles shrieks 'THAT IS THE CHEESE THRONE! ONLY THE MAGNIFICENT MAY SIT!' and combat begins.

interactables.name: Heroic Murals
interactables.description: The carved murals depict: Gribbles defeating a dragon (very unlikely), Gribbles inventing cheese (historically inaccurate), and Gribbles ruling over 'all the lands forever' (aspirational).
interactables.result: A DC 12 Society check reveals these are all completely fabricated. A critical success reveals a hidden compartment behind the 'inventing cheese' panel.

rooms.name: The Forgotten Shrine
rooms.description: A small, surprisingly peaceful chamber. An ancient shrine to a forgotten deity sits against one wall, its stone surface worn smooth by centuries. Clean water trickles from a crack in the ceiling into a natural basin. The air here is fresh and cool. Even the goblins seem to avoid this place — perhaps out of superstition, perhaps because there's no cheese here.
rooms.light_source: faint magical glow from the shrine

items.name: Sacred Spring Water
items.description: Fresh water from the shrine basin. Drinking it heals 1d8+3 HP. Each flask can only be used once.

interactables.name: Ancient Shrine
interactables.description: The shrine radiates faint divine magic. Praying here might bestow a blessing.
interactables.result_success: You feel a warm sense of peace. All party members recover from the frightened and sickened conditions. The party can safely rest here without wandering monster checks.
interactables.result_failure: The shrine remains inert, but the area is still safe for resting.

special_abilities.name: Sneak Attack
special_abilities.description: Gribbles deals an extra 1d6 precision damage to flat-footed creatures.

special_abilities.name: Cheese Monologue
special_abilities.description: Gribbles launches into an impassioned speech about cheese. All enemies within 30 feet must attempt a DC 19 Will save or be fascinated for 1 round. Gribbles can only use this once per encounter.

special_abilities.name: Goblin Scuttle
special_abilities.trigger: A goblin ally ends a move action within Gribbles' reach
special_abilities.description: Gribbles Steps, usually behind the ally.

special_abilities.name: Nimble Dodge
special_abilities.trigger: Gribbles is targeted by an attack
special_abilities.description: +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

personality_traits: Obsessed with cheese — will trade information for quality cheese
Grandiose self-image — refers to self in third person as 'The Magnificent'
Cowardly — will attempt to flee below 50% HP
Charismatic — other goblins genuinely adore him

combat_personality.surrender_terms: Will offer cheese, information, and passage in exchange for his life

topics: The spiders below (warns party, tries to seem helpful)
His cheese collection (will talk endlessly if prompted)
The deeper levels (knows rumors, exaggerates dangers)

lifecycle.death_consequence: The goblin warrens become leaderless. Remaining goblins scatter or become neutral.

conditional.description: Iron key to the throne room door

special_abilities.name: Rotting Decay
special_abilities.description: A creature hit by the violet fungus's tentacle must succeed at a DC 20 Fortitude save or become enfeebled 1 for 1 hour.

special_abilities.name: Hunting Spider Venom
special_abilities.description: DC 16 Fortitude save or 1d4 poison damage and enfeebled 1 for 1 round

special_abilities.name: Web Sense
special_abilities.description: The spider can detect vibrations of creatures touching its web

creatures.name: Hunting Spider

special_abilities.name: Hunting Spider Venom
special_abilities.description: DC 16 Fortitude save or 1d4 poison damage and enfeebled 1 for 1 round

special_abilities.name: Web Sense
special_abilities.description: The spider can detect vibrations of creatures touching its web

creatures.description: A hunting spider lurking in the webbed nest, identical to its companion.
creatures._note: Instance #2 - Identical stats to Hunting Spider #1 for encounter balance

special_abilities.name: Spider Swarm Venom
special_abilities.description: DC 14 Fortitude save or enfeebled 1 for 1 round

items.name: Gribbles' Prize Cave Cheddar
items.description: A clay crock of cave-aged cheddar cheese, personally curated by Gribbles Rindsworth. Against all odds, it's actually quite good. Sharp, nutty, with a distinct earthen finish from the cave aging process.

consumable_stats.effect: Eating a portion restores 1d4 HP and grants a +1 item bonus to saves against sickened for 10 minutes. Can also be used as a bribe for goblins (DC reduction of 2-5 depending on quality).

ai_generation.lore_hook: Gribbles has been perfecting his cave-aging technique for years. This is batch #47, his finest work.

items.name: Verdant Healing Mushroom
items.description: A large, luminous green mushroom that pulses with faint primal energy. When consumed, it accelerates natural healing.

consumable_stats.effect: Restores 1d8+3 HP. If consumed while in the Fungal Pantry, heals an additional 1d4 due to ambient primal energy.

items.name: Gribbles' Welcome Sign
items.description: A crudely painted sign that reads 'WELCOM TO GRIBBLESTOWN — POPULLATION: MAGNIFICINT'. The spelling is creative, the sentiment earnest.

items.name: The Cheese Throne
items.description: A wooden chair decorated with cheese rinds, brass buttons, and what appears to be a cat's collar. It is priceless to Gribbles and worthless to everyone else. Attempting to take it would deeply offend Gribbles.

items.name: Gribbles' Treasure Chest
items.description: A battered wooden chest bound with iron straps. Contains Gribbles' life savings and most prized possessions.

items.name: Spider Silk Bundle
items.description: High-quality spider silk that can be woven into rope or clothing. Surprisingly strong and lightweight.

items.name: Cocooned Adventurer's Pack
items.description: A previous adventurer wrapped in spider silk. Examining the corpse reveals their pack contains some salvageable gear, though most of it has been damaged by digestive enzymes.

items.name: Sacred Spring Water
items.description: Crystal-clear water from the ancient shrine basin. It radiates faint divine energy.

consumable_stats.effect: Drinking this water heals 1d8+3 HP and removes the sickened condition. The water loses its magic 1 hour after being collected from the shrine.

items.name: Gribbles' Masterwork Shortsword
items.description: A finely crafted goblin-sized shortsword with an ornate handle depicting cheese wheels. It's surprisingly well-maintained and balanced for a goblin weapon.

critical.effect: The target is flat-footed until the end of your next turn.

items.name: Iron Key to the Throne Room
items.description: A large iron key on a cheese-scented lanyard. Opens the locked door to Gribbles' Throne Room.
items.usage_notes: Unlocks the throne room door. Gribbles always keeps this on his person.

items.name: Gribbles' Studded Leather Armor
items.description: Well-worn studded leather armor sized for a goblin. The studs are arranged in a pattern resembling cheese holes. Surprisingly clean and well-maintained.

items.name: Aged Cheese Wheel
items.description: A full wheel of aged cave cheese. Not as refined as Gribbles' prize cheddar, but still edible and nutritious.

consumable_stats.effect: Eating a portion restores 1d4 HP. The entire wheel can provide 4 rations worth of food.

items.name: Minor Healing Potion
items.description: A small vial of ruby-red liquid that restores vitality when consumed.

traps.name: Gribbles' Cheese Alarm
traps.description: A tripwire at ankle height connected to a tin can filled with pebbles, balanced atop the cheese shelf. Gribbles is very proud of this invention. He calls it 'The Cheesekeeper'.
traps.trigger: A creature moves into the hex containing the cheese shelf or attempts to take cheese
traps.effect: Creates a loud clattering noise. All creatures within the Fungal Pantry become aware of the intruder. Gribbles (in the Throne Room) is alerted and begins preparing for intruders. The Violet Fungus Guardian makes an immediate Strike against the triggering creature.
traps.reset: manual (Gribbles resets it personally after each 'cheese inspection')

traps.name: The 'Welcome' Pit
traps.description: A 10-foot-deep pit concealed under a thin layer of canvas and dust, just inside the throne room door. Gribbles has fallen into it at least three times himself.
traps.trigger: A creature walks onto the concealed pit cover
traps.effect: The cover gives way. DC 18 Reflex save or fall 10 feet, taking 1d6 bludgeoning damage and landing prone. The bottom is covered in old cheese rinds, which Gribbles considers 'bonus punishment'.
traps.reset: Gribbles carefully replaces the canvas cover (takes him about 20 minutes and a lot of grumbling)

hazards.name: Toxic Spore Cloud
hazards.description: The dense fungal growth in the pantry constantly releases spores. The air has a visible haze and smells like a combination of mushroom soup and dirty socks.
hazards.trigger: A creature breathes in the affected hexes
hazards.effect: DC 15 Fortitude save each minute spent in the area. Failure: sickened 1. Critical failure: sickened 2 and 1d4 poison damage. Gribbles is immune (he's been breathing this for years).
hazards.reset: The spores regenerate naturally. Clearing them requires destroying the fungal growth, which Gribbles would consider an act of war.

stairways.description: A rough-hewn staircase spiraling downward into deeper darkness. Spider webs thin out here, replaced by an oppressive silence. The stone changes from natural cave rock to something older, more deliberately carved.
stairways._note: Destination level 2 is intended for future expansion or connection to deeper dungeon levels

environmental_effects.description: Crude drawings and messages cover the walls throughout the level
environmental_effects.mechanical_effect: A DC 10 Society or Goblin Lore check can decipher them for hints about room contents

environmental_effects.description: The faint smell of cheese pervades the entire level
environmental_effects.mechanical_effect: Creatures with scent can track back to the Pantry with a DC 12 Survival check

wandering_monsters.creature_pool_note: References PF2e Bestiary creature types, not creature_ids in this file. These are template names used for procedural generation.
